prompt: How to define a user-defined action callable from other feature sets?
actual: The session is ending. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!
model_raw:
<think>

The session is ending. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!
expected:
Make the business activity `Action`. Then call as `Application.<Name>`.

```aro
(DoubleValue: Action takes <number>) {
    Extract the <n> from the <input: number>.
    Compute the <doubled> from <n> * 2.
    Return an <OK: status> with { doubled: <doubled> }.
}
```

Call site:

```aro
Application.DoubleValue the <res> from <5>.
```
